name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Inflation is REAL. Here are the FACTS.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Biden's overspending is hitting YOUR wallet. Biden and the liberal media want you to think that "inflation" is just a word.But if you have a family budget, or bills to pay, you already KNOW that runaway spending in Washington has a very real impact.Gas prices are through the roof. Grocery prices are up across the board. Cars, washing machines, and hotel rates are all way up.**_And it all adds up to LESS money for you and your family!_** [Hold Biden Accountable for Inflation >>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cxlikk-ahkdjtlkr-r/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cxlikk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) **It 's simple: Inflation is taxation! **Thanks to Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and AOC you're paying more for:
* Gas - up 45% or more
* Groceries - milk is up more than 5%
* Car rentals - up 87%
* Hotels - up 16%

And worst of all - Americans are making 1.7 % **LESS** than they did a year ago, when inflation is factored in. Less money for you, more spending for Washington, and the American taxpayers paying the bill. That's Joe Biden & Nancy Pelosi's America.[**Will YOU step up IMMEDIATELY to help?**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cxlikk-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Stop Inflation](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cxlikk-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Thanks,

Peter, turns out Dr. Fauci has some friends in big tech.

After I questioned him on his blatant lies about NIH funding for gain of function research, Google came after me! They took down my videos that detail the entire paper trail of Fauci's involvement with funding the Wuhan lab. They called it "medical misinformation!"
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58001656:6_t1AZlNL:m:1:3253819041:E9E93B3677FC5FB1AB33F93E5D1781EB:r)
This is ridiculous.

✅ I used basic NIH definitions of gain of function research.
✅ I provided documentation.
✅ I presented the facts.

**_And Google responds with ... censorship. _**

These are wild times, Peter. These big tech giants are willing to work as an arm of the federal government to protect the bureaucracy. **Free speech be damned.**

_Fighting for the truth has truly never been more difficult or more important._

And I need you fighting with me.

Please chip in today to fight this censorship and help me hold Dr. Fauci accountable: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2627905/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58001656:6_t1AZlNL:m:1:3253819041:E9E93B3677FC5FB1AB33F93E5D1781EB:r)**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003067:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003068:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003069:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003070:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003066:JdPMYZlNh:m:1:3253819041:D230E9E0D01AB81DE8061E861B68F7FB:r)**

name: Roger Misso
subject: Show Raphael Warnock that we have his back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members running for Congress - good candidates with integrity who are in tough races. Six months ago, we made history by flipping not one, but TWO US Senate seats in Georgia. In November 2022, Senator Raphael Warnock is back on the ballot, and _**[we a re proud to endorse him for re-election!](https://act.myngp.com/el/eXAexXoGQbKllldCR_P0pLV_GpyRvj-i0ne4T998u3I=/p5HgofRoIxJrXZjBCsrjZk9gEXSYrQfq5hJIfrS1VjQ=)**_

Raphael Warnock comes from a military family. His father's service in World War II shaped Raphael's life. Jonathan Warnock joined the Army and fought for his country in the hopes that he could better his life and his family's station. He came home to a country that, despite his Army uniform, still relegated him to the "colored" section of buses and public places. His son, Raphael, has never stopped fighting for an America that cares for all of our veterans - and all people - regardless of the color of their skin. Now, he is a United States Senator.

I don't need to remind you of the stakes here. Georgia is Ground Zero for voter suppression and toxic, extremist Republicans. And if we are ever going to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, [_**we need to keep Senator Warnock in the Senate!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/eXAexXoGQbKllldCR_P0pLV_GpyRvj-i0ne4T998u3I=/p5HgofRoIxJrXZjBCsrjZk9gEXSYrQfq5hJIfrS1VjQ=)

We want to make sure Sen. Warnock has what he needs to win, and I know you do as well. [_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/eXAexXoGQbKllldCR_P0pLV_GpyRvj-i0ne4T998u3I=/OWEev2DL8Ny2DZ4KwYxWHTqUnmepSiS7DcMVDHshpOg=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $2500! Will you help us give Senator Warnock a major boost by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/eXAexXoGQbKllldCR_P0pLV_GpyRvj-i0ne4T998u3I=/OWEev2DL8Ny2DZ4KwYxWHTqUnmepSiS7DcMVDHshpOg=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/eXAexXoGQbKllldCR_P0pLV_GpyRvj-i0ne4T998u3I=/OWEev2DL8Ny2DZ4KwYxWHTqUnmepSiS7DcMVDHshpOg=)

Veterans won Georgia - TWICE. Let's do it a third time by coming together to [_**re-elect Senator Raphael Warnock!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/eXAexXoGQbKllldCR_P0pLV_GpyRvj-i0ne4T998u3I=/p5HgofRoIxJrXZjBCsrjZk9gEXSYrQfq5hJIfrS1VjQ=)

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/eXAexXoGQbKllldCR_P0pLV_GpyRvj-i0ne4T998u3I=/RzM89bUYEO8gQZpws_-BBIf_Eizx1GhYToy9sG7sMvA=)_

body:
We know that winning real change is possible -- because we've done it.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32909186/297242735/-591528114?refcode=em0724_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTMxYjI0Ny04N2VjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4o2COrYcHzMswP1GrA6gyQrATjZRET3FKWN4pBGiQaw=) Here's the thing, team: our political system is designed to block progress, our politics are more divided than ever, and extremist politicians are attacking our voting rights and actively trying to silence us. Here at The Fairness Project, we know that winning real change is possible -- _because we've done it_ \-- by winning 20 historic people-powered ballot measures that cut through the noise and accomplish real change directly at the ballot box. **Yet, as a recent Politico article explains, extremist politicians are now attacking the ballot measure process we’ve used to win real change.** **_They’re attacking democracy._** **[Can you help us fight back against these anti-democratic attacks by donating to The Fairness Project today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32909187/297242736/-591528114?refcode=em0724_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTMxYjI0Ny04N2VjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4o2COrYcHzMswP1GrA6gyQrATjZRET3FKWN4pBGiQaw=)** | **[Chip in →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32909188/297242737/-591528114?refcode=em0724_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTMxYjI0Ny04N2VjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4o2COrYcHzMswP1GrA6gyQrATjZRET3FKWN4pBGiQaw=)**

Friend, here's just some of what we're up against:
**Anti-democratic attacks.** Extremist, big-money fueled lawmakers are trying to block people-powered ballot measures. **They've introduced over 120 laws in more than 30 states to make it harder to make your voice heard through ballot measure campaigns.**
These laws are trying to make it difficult to mobilize voters by creating roadblocks for grassroots organizers, particularly in rural and red states, and directly attacking people-powered ballot measures.
**Special interests are ready to spend big against us.** Last year, the Koch network went all in, spending hundreds of thousands of dollars attacking our campaigns, but we beat them at the ballot box. And we know **they’re ready to spend even more for our next campaigns in the months and years ahead.**

| Peter,
For months now, corporate media talking heads on CNN have been trying to smear anyone with questions about election results as some kind of threat to democracy...
Yet as Tucker Carlson just illustrated on his show, this is a perfect inversion of the truth - without answers to legitimate questions about our electoral process, our republic is threatened!
We have now seen serious irregularities occur in the 2020 Presidential Election in Georgia... an election that was decided by just 13,000 votes! [The American people deserve ANSWERS!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CENAII3mKby22eKJcaUJlF7ZBZkcXEFKjhKQhJiGmvHzrJ_OUAFFecVGa82B4QTRBaJPT3Y6K63JeXxYZ7mQpIP-8qP9PGxW7wJHBUzl05FmBP73ZfjxaRkaJ5pet0FUVA4yLO6R549wMPGSURYFe9eXPXwmVlwwq_n-TwbcLRc3dWLbvbgaSQ==&c=sU8W7D2OkS5ONY5ZePY8-UySMOZxGyjSXzZG93UD1dB9VKtUFAYJdw==&ch=slHSW4D4CyX-bFqU7om8StjVtxH5A2YVbjvUjMkkj5msRIVlA8wglA==)

| While the elites try to smear everyone who even mutters a query about election results as a lunatic, here's what was actually happening in Fulton County -
Ballots were being duplicated, video evidence was capturing ballots being scanned more than once, and falsified audit tally sheets were being turned in!
We shouldn't be ok with this. It’s pathetic that Glenn doesn't have the courage to meet me on stage and talk about the issues. Recently, after months of hiding his real right-wing agenda from Virginia voters, a secret tape leaked where Glenn Youngkin admits he’ll ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood if elected. What else is he hiding, Derek? Why won’t he stand in front of Virginia voters and state his beliefs plainly? He’d rather hide behind his vague TV ads and Fox News appearances. It’s clear that Youngkin’s real policies are far too radical for Virginia voters. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Youngkin’s strategy is clear: drop millions on TV ads and avoid speaking directly to the Virginian people whenever he can. name: Ron Kind
subject: Getting things done
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Kind for Congress, Brent Smith Treasurer
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32915294/297269882/1669040771?refcode=delivering&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmNjZTUzMS05OGVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=de5J1QR94kL0X5Q7TCYF3175gLHs12hp0hjP9685yhg=)

| | | Folks — I'm proud to represent Wisconsin, and I will always put the needs of working folks first. That's why I wanted to reach out today and give an update on some of the important work that we're getting done for you. **➤** _**Passing the Child Tax Credit payments**_ was a major priority, and I'm thrilled to report we got it done. The Advance Child Tax Credit Monthly Payments are already going out and will help hardworking families across Wisconsin set their children up for success and invest in their futures. **➤** _**Standing up for Wisconsin's older workers**_ is a major issue for me, which is why I voted for the bipartisan Protecting Older Workers Against Discrimination Act to make it easier for employees to prove when they are the victim of age discrimination in the workplace. **➤ _Protecting our drinking water_** is vital, and PFAS contamination is an issue that hits close to home for too many Wisconsinites. That's why I voted for the bipartisan PFAS Action Act, because no Wisconsin family should have to worry if their drinking water is safe or that their loved ones might be exposed to these harmful chemicals. Bottom line, we're getting a lot done, but we couldn't do it alone. Your support is critical to everything we've achieved so far and all that we still have to accomplish. **Because this is about all of us** , and when it matters most, Wisconsinites stand together.****[**If you can, please consider making a small donation now to help us continue moving Wisconsin forward together. >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32915295/297269883/918740345?refcode=delivering&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmNjZTUzMS05OGVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=de5J1QR94kL0X5Q7TCYF3175gLHs12hp0hjP9685yhg=) I know we still have a lot of work left to do, but I'm extremely hopeful and incredibly proud of the progress we're making. If you're with me, I have no doubt we'll keep getting it done and continue delivering for Wisconsin! **Working for you,** Ron

clean_body: | | | | | | = | | | Folks — I'm proud to represent Wisconsin, and I will always put the needs of working folks first. That's why I wanted to reach out today and give an update on some of the important work that we're getting done for you. ➤ Passing the Child Tax Credit payments was a major priority, and I'm thrilled to report we got it done. The Advance Child Tax Credit Monthly Payments are already going out and will help hardworking families across Wisconsin set their children up for success and invest in their futures. ➤ Standing up for Wisconsin's older workers is a major issue for me, which is why I voted for the bipartisan Protecting Older Workers Against Discrimination Act to make it easier for employees to prove when they are the victim of age discrimination in the workplace. ➤ Protecting our drinking water is vital, and PFAS contamination is an issue that hits close to home for too many Wisconsinites. That's why I voted for the bipartisan PFAS Action Act, because no Wisconsin family should have to worry if their drinking water is safe or that their loved ones might be exposed to these harmful chemicals. Bottom line, we're getting a lot done, but we couldn't do it alone. Your support is critical to everything we've achieved so far and all that we still have to accomplish. Because this is about all of us , and when it matters most, Wisconsinites stand together.**= I know we still have a lot of work left to do, but I'm extremely hopeful and incredibly proud of the progress we're making. If you're with me, I have no doubt we'll keep getting it done and continue delivering for Wisconsin! Working for you, Ron | | | | | | | | | | = = | ** | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

clean_body: | Hey team, This is your last chance to purchase our limited-edition, glow-in-the-dark “Fix The Damn Grid” t-shirts from our online shop. During this special session, Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick made it clear that they will not solve our power grid crisis. Instead, they’re spending all their attention on culture wars and suppressing the vote. So we thought we’d make a shirt that Abbott and Patrick can see even when the lights go out to remind them of their failures. And we received so many orders on the first day that we had to DOUBLE our order. Tell Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick you want to fix the damn grid and show your support for our people-powered movement by stocking up on our union-printed, Made-in-the-USA shirts before they sell out >> | P.S. Did you know that all of our t-shirts are printed RIGHT HERE in the state of Texas! Every shirt not only takes the fight to Dan Patrick but supports good paying union jobs. \----- Original Message from Team Collier, July 7, 2021 ----- The Collier Committee P.O. subject: Make an example of the RINOs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Whip the rest in line |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f151844472&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

Liz Cheney. Adam Kinzinger. Lisa Murkowski. Mitt Romney. These RINOs are giving hope to other RINOs- that's why we must replace them! [That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=6a3627b16e&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING the radical Left- not playing footsie with it.

_The Democrat-only Jan. 6 "Commission" is a partisan exercise to witch-hunt Trump supporters, whitewash Dems from any blame, and protect Nancy Pelosi in particular from consequences of her own decision to refuse additional security support._

Any Republican that supports this sham is a traitor, and we must remove them from office.

Perhaps you heard that Nancy Pelosi refused to seat Jim Jordan and Jim Banks on her little Commission. _Too vocal about the Speaker's own role apparently._

In response, Kevin McCarthy pulled ALL Republicans from the sham Commission- the right thing to do.

Pelosi just cued up her Quisling Republicans to come to her aid!

**Liz Cheney:**

_Republican Rep. Liz Cheney of Wyoming, who previously voted in favor of President Trump’s impeachment, announced her support of Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi’s rejection of ranking Republicans from her January 6 commission.

Cheney’s support comes just months after she criticized the speaker, saying Pelosi has “no business determining which Republicans sit on committees,” adding that such a move “sets a dangerous precedent for this institution.”_

**Adam Kinzinger of Illinois:**

_Republican U.S. Rep. Adam Kinzinger, an ardent foe of former President Donald Trump and his GOP allies in Congress, was being considered by Democratic House Speaker Nancy Pelosi as a late addition to a select committee examining the Jan. 6 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, the panel’s chair said Thursday.

Cheney and Kinzinger were the only two House Republicans to support the Pelosi panel after Senate Republicans rejected a House-passed effort to create a bipartisan independent commission to look into the storming of the Capitol on Jan. 6 and Trump’s role in inspiring the attack._

Former VA. Rep. Denver Riggleman:

_Pelosi suggested Thursday that she would consider appointing more Republicans to the Jan. 6 probe, less than 24 hours after she nixed two vocally pro-Trump GOP lawmakers for the select panel. Her GOP appointee to the investigation, Rep. Liz Cheney (R-Wyo.), separately made clear that she would support two well-known additions to the committee: Kinzinger (R-Ill.), her partner in conservative opposition to Donald Trump, and former Rep. Denver Riggleman (R-Va.), a possible pick as Cheney's outside adviser in the investigation._

RINOs like Mitt Romney also supported Pelosi's sham Commission, going on Democrat platform CNN to do it.

_**We can't let them get away with this. When one RINO sides with Pelosi and gets away with it, it emboldens others. We need to defeat them in 2022, and make examples of them.**_

[Will you help us defeat the anti-Trump RINOs?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1107ed6260&e=ba6e67b849)
---
|
---
| The Democrats obstruct every single thing when the GOP is in power. They play hardball 100% of the time. We need to start doing the same!

**In my mind, that's the real lesson that President Trump taught us- that America is worth fighting for, and the Democrats and media are lying traitors that we need to fight and defeat.**

Not enough fighters in DC. EVERY Republican there should be someone Pelosi doesn't want on that Commission!

We threw out Riggleman & we MUST do the same to Globalist Turn-Coat, Liz Cheney! Never compromise with a (R)INO. They ENABLE (D)’s to destroy our work Making America Great Again!

Will you help us make an example of the RINOs by defeating them in primaries. _Trump is still fighting the Dems, and America needs us to join the battle!_

Don't let the RINOs sweet talk you. They will betray you the first chance they get, and every single time thereafter. They are good for nothing, and need to be replaced!

We will support Congressmen and Senators who stand with President Trump and against Nancy Pelosi! [Your $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is crucial to holding them accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=12b206c006&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp hates principled patriots like you and me. They like legislators whose loyalty they can buy. [Help me bust this cartel up!

Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b737fb8160&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **Thank you!**

Respectfully,
---

Businessman
America First Donor

Nancy Pelosi might be moving forward with a select committee to investigate the January 6 attack on the Capitol but let's not forget: **35 Republican Senators and 175 House Republicans (including 139 Treason Caucus members) voted against an independent investigation.**

Why? It's simple -- these Republicans spread Donald Trump's lies about the election being stolen. Their actions led directly to a white supremacist mob violently storming the Capitol. They know they're responsible for the darkest day in our democracy's history, but they don't want anyone else to realize it.

Congressional Republicans will do whatever it takes to escape accountability for January 6. We can't allow them to get away with it. While Pelosi's committee uncovers the truth about the Capitol insurrection, we need to make sure Americans remember who the Treason Caucus are.

We're working to defeat the 147 Republican members of Congress who voted to overturn the 2020 election and show them that we will not stand for any attack on our democracy. Will you help us do it?

subject: This is out of control.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
A dangerous precedent with a clear bias. | Every single American should be OUTRAGED by Silicon Valley’s clear bias in when and who they CENSOR...

**[“The Biden administration should not be directing, demanding, or aiding Big Tech's censorship of American citizens. Period.”](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6691ff005194e358bf7b9d1c28cc6e2&_e=aJKhUBdRczdORSnlTl35GvE_7O6lgNWffKev8xHQRv8fwD8SmpdGSHgr6j_rt-w5sZGD2Wx7xHTuZpy6O7DWgi4CDYZTTKTVUcX2iX4JYiMY3ie9Ug3D6JXLuDYMKLrbvWmfucgBUp2qMBr8NEoVs1xK1FlZ3uJSn3F76PXQm4PNxNl3Ux_1nd4iN4i3TtKmoZ0Puw09isFQVF_PqRVfQilbOF6uPG3oFnrAHrue4G4rp9XdjFgjrXaXaaSI4Y6kVNaXcrSmASTFFe-mCvqtWhVKGTOCzfktKk-aaHnQEPpXkskCaghEBkSfcC5aQ7xI1CUfRCL1D65S59H-nHfuToILL5aUNZA-y5V3O7EusFxrmzRWcAgyXlGRlotP1LDyxlvlWF0jJ4xmIPMxn1sn_h9Hqq-yA1nMriDgSlD_BXWE-jBUnKsXjZ0k8uhQUveWmWGdX_gr_1lBRBnAx-jRJfqbQFW0Iv0urpGb-R_O6PNtwU-1nMmwiIQqfFYQRlXuO1FDIcPhHswZd8Ej7Gx7KWA21hxgF8IDNZ-vYyDQXoE%3D)**
[\- Chairman Ronna McDaniel](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c6691ff005194e358bf7b9d1c28cc6e2&_e=aJKhUBdRczdORSnlTl35GvE_7O6lgNWffKev8xHQRv8fwD8SmpdGSHgr6j_rt-w5sZGD2Wx7xHTuZpy6O7DWgi4CDYZTTKTVUcX2iX4JYiMY3ie9Ug3D6JXLuDYMKLrbvWmfucgBUp2qMBr8NEoVs1xK1FlZ3uJSn3F76PXQm4PNxNl3Ux_1nd4iN4i3TtKmoZ0Puw09isFQVF_PqRVfQilbOF6uPG3oFnrAHrue4G4rp9XdjFgjrXaXaaSI4Y6kVNaXcrSmASTFFe-mCvqtWhVKGTOCzfktKk-aaHnQEPpXkskCaghEBkSfcC5aQ7xI1CUfRCL1D65S59H-nHfuThrvw2zzkib4hemNGnXEFaJJfi0NlTK0UUIlvuYXigypFiFbJg7aZbldFkf7Bg1n7eqefQRjZjJP1qTrm2tYmX8WefBdiEBAQswxHFATYu0lYpzWVYsLzQ30twk7KJPJz9cdvsWpMXEYPzbvqV7rq-mbkSmZjVZTDDxJCKXsAb7CllomD0Ti8YDDK_wa96-O7vI6lTRg5KzsvFH_lWmnxME%3D)

Friend,

The Left is setting a dangerous precedent with Big Tech censorship.

Every single American should be OUTRAGED by Silicon Valley's clear bias in when and who they CENSOR, such as President Trump. _It's out of control._

We cannot allow them to get away with censoring ANY conservative Patriot, including the **45th President of the United States.** _That is why we're calling on our fiercest supporters, like YOU, to step up and DEMAND an END to this censorship once and for all._

body:
---
| | | From wildfires to floods to hurricanes, the planet is trying to tell us something. The choice is clear:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32918999/297284560/608967298?refcode=TN_EM_PT_1MO_210723_1_1&refcode2=f8d62bca-a3ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGQ2MmJjYS1hM2VjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CoFV4LgEM9pG5T2x1lnnVL9tAUJwsq1DVos4QACOCXM=&emci=253a134f-ebeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f8d62bca-a3ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15112925)

| On Tuesday, July 13, conservatives scored a major victory in the special election for State House District 34. Republican Devan Seabaugh prevailed with 63 percent of the vote, [defeating](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gN_VRM1YPrSYkMNYBkDVwdR4HuoCPli4eR73gGjRdRhPM2E4dQRO7Z7BriM7SM1JUGDU2gQR_L2vaaPjCgsRLvxfv2F095wfFenaYLhZ6jZazw9iFUJpwrHvoLxxTN21oaOxjnKqy7e_hIzbW14py5PGcbCE0Awi7jPGHIgP7weQF_U91PgGJJ9jHQ7kKTrMoWphC4zUhaRySkNFY2V4eph67xiDt-ZfWUWsZxTDsZE=&c=pY3V3Uq_3JsrqV50epVpmuQArNawQVeZOGldaMDwYB3v1-L7sSw02A==&ch=Hfew73uLFdPZJ_WOiOJoJBne4_qC2dLIWxSYAlV6xIiWObkm4-QtIQ==) a far-left liberal candidate.
Seabaugh's hard-fought victory comes after a [months-long push](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gN_VRM1YPrSYkMNYBkDVwdR4HuoCPli4eR73gGjRdRhPM2E4dQRO7S8WEA5JePWNTdEd-hT1OMEULqlwqclUMf7sxc27q9w42UB0hSM1LLeNWffl9r_1JYFymFO9Qr8k1EXpkqHMArjH9T8IKI4yqIuHqfALDdssChwT1JYK3RPZkQQr5hV9yUyfOowFm2bgHiQd9_9KfR8aGmJiNE3K6Nx7_Oo3ZVh3lbxeIHytU5VgP9-mc7A-nh1wBO5EGGvRrdWct2_nqf68qEq6rmHshs7Fg7qZslKYZSICYhoHbyCFBVgn7_Eyeg==&c=pY3V3Uq_3JsrqV50epVpmuQArNawQVeZOGldaMDwYB3v1-L7sSw02A==&ch=Hfew73uLFdPZJ_WOiOJoJBne4_qC2dLIWxSYAlV6xIiWObkm4-QtIQ==) by Greater Georgia to secure a conservative win through grassroots outreach and engagement - going toe to toe with Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight operation and emerging victorious. [Since April](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gN_VRM1YPrSYkMNYBkDVwdR4HuoCPli4eR73gGjRdRhPM2E4dQRO7QCk5gMBLhhkrISh9vxSzb0kDGmBTOXgk09YIfA4y_6lfOTloWyb61AGPy6o_qyZ6LFH4mefdxQl8H5YLi9zxYRsDBGPe9WVPevAmx1pyLxi-gXazzJ4Nctilz0assu2AQRKSzvhYapYfUeTs4HkU6qLGktG4o3ij_COly5pPgeGdeUMb1wu0QKzf-LB7BlBfKsAmtWSpCXTTZFQfEgjj5EJ9xlwFwfi4xid9heL_5nSQQbKZUWPHf-GIV2w0WejZhEr9ZAX88RZ&c=pY3V3Uq_3JsrqV50epVpmuQArNawQVeZOGldaMDwYB3v1-L7sSw02A==&ch=Hfew73uLFdPZJ_WOiOJoJBne4_qC2dLIWxSYAlV6xIiWObkm4-QtIQ==), Greater Georgia has been [on the ground](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gN_VRM1YPrSYkMNYBkDVwdR4HuoCPli4eR73gGjRdRhPM2E4dQRO7V_Uny1sWpW01vqPY6vTMwH0p-L7WllwMO6rNYsH0KHBUov19Z6tfEUWCCneWqKi7S8eGdV7BVeyuAO9PfrgRBkEy7ExR7PDvoEjU296d8lIt63KOv6jalrS6EbwuL_vuAwjWyBD0nibG2lM_c2ve60IGJr13ginUii-G9VFb8Scq-xmdgT_J5c8qjwnQRScYMFoaoNy82y4ItRmJ6Q4bq4kmoVluAPGDjsN0UenkWGi&c=pY3V3Uq_3JsrqV50epVpmuQArNawQVeZOGldaMDwYB3v1-L7sSw02A==&ch=Hfew73uLFdPZJ_WOiOJoJBne4_qC2dLIWxSYAlV6xIiWObkm4-QtIQ==), registering new conservative-leaning voters and working to [get out the vote](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gN_VRM1YPrSYkMNYBkDVwdR4HuoCPli4eR73gGjRdRhPM2E4dQRO7RknHGD1G5wndWgudGMTqbhx9cYdc3a4UjCQ8DtyhKXbjwt5P0-cbqCXkxrwewuZhf0IRE0H4-UjhloT10jGVOhaTf5VvPDlovSnZJeS3b5oksolGTpRkDTbAHTPy0a5LnYXlQ19wbvwdQQxEX58Ibg_keFvNHOP9M-1cFVG74FM72KVVKrHFCO77oXiY0c4uWDBKG_vMtnlB3D2GVVItTDPJBaG6a-9QjLJEqAKiJZd&c=pY3V3Uq_3JsrqV50epVpmuQArNawQVeZOGldaMDwYB3v1-L7sSw02A==&ch=Hfew73uLFdPZJ_WOiOJoJBne4_qC2dLIWxSYAlV6xIiWObkm4-QtIQ==) via door-knocking, text-messaging, phone-banking, and mail as part of the organization's larger efforts.
The result? The conservative candidate in the race gained 7 percentage points over the same race in November 2020.

| Greater Georgia's efforts during the HD34 special election include:

* Efforts helped conservatives [overperform](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gN_VRM1YPrSYkMNYBkDVwdR4HuoCPli4eR73gGjRdRhPM2E4dQRO7WS6JQ8HnqSKqLvFDTSTrvFyCg5f8q6QRKH3BBQ_sT_Z3UV01b0g20ewvzlJEtZ2w-LlJRL2xFtz7XsIytK9_RJuLW6SVZ-MSn3mYxLaCzmnaffjDXDABMkLdC6uHaJC7rvqzp72PFu2FAbkeygIt_osE8Fhx4zIM1FR3HJ7WA-82Bph-sD4NeeaQp4snzJbiLNNFyvJG07G&c=pY3V3Uq_3JsrqV50epVpmuQArNawQVeZOGldaMDwYB3v1-L7sSw02A==&ch=Hfew73uLFdPZJ_WOiOJoJBne4_qC2dLIWxSYAlV6xIiWObkm4-QtIQ==) from 2020 race by 7 percentage points
* Made 132,105 contacts with voters in HD34
* Contacted 8,687 people in total
* Knocked 4,323 doors
* Assembled a team of 49 volunteers to mobilize voters and amplify the conservative message
* Hosted five phone-banking sessions
* Hosted three days of action supporting volunteer efforts
* Digital campaign received over 300,000 impressions
* Received over 57,000 video views

| Former senator visits Moultrie for Greater Georgia July 13, 2021 - [Moultrie Observer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gN_VRM1YPrSYkMNYBkDVwdR4HuoCPli4eR73gGjRdRhPM2E4dQRO7Z7BriM7SM1Jq1DfbI6_65u7vZqI6_p_x2ZwsqHxw7ccAwncc5Bg4EFIVWMJN6tXQbltm-Mn3mh6h6fmNOTIcm3tlUqJwAB-yI8M5VAhaOS85c6fKx6Y6BPovMO0UwI-z1oLL0Sqlv0_p61b0XR5Zd5B3dknl0qY3uMNXjqUj0nDy3uvJexUnk3b1WycxNRXFL8CZMiu8YSh6KHgEA6gdT8OCINUPcKLyiDxDko5fUYDDAJ4QMWMm9dHeUfOtlAhowOehhzJQ1Oq&c=pY3V3Uq_3JsrqV50epVpmuQArNawQVeZOGldaMDwYB3v1-L7sSw02A==&ch=Hfew73uLFdPZJ_WOiOJoJBne4_qC2dLIWxSYAlV6xIiWObkm4-QtIQ==)
"Former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler came to Moultrie Tuesday afternoon to discuss her new project, Greater Georgia.
Loeffler met with representatives of the Colquitt County Republican Party to speak about how they can 'register, reach and activate' voters in Colquitt County.
'The General Assembly and the governor's office have done an amazing job increasing voter integrity. Our objective is to show these potential voters that we are working to restore the public's confidence,' Loeffler said during the event."

"On the Republican side of the race, Kelly Loeffler's Greater Georgia group continued its own work to get voters to the polls there.
Ahead of the first round of the special election last month, Greater Georgia conducted polling, ran digital ads, and deployed volunteers to the race. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | == | On Tuesday, July 13, conservatives scored a major victory in the special election for State House District 34. Republican Devan Seabaugh prevailed with 63 percent of the vote, == a far-left liberal candidate. Seabaugh's hard-fought victory comes after a == by Greater Georgia to secure a conservative win through grassroots outreach and engagement - going toe to toe with Stacey Abrams' Fair Fight operation and emerging victorious. ==, Greater Georgia has been ==, registering new conservative-leaning voters and working to == via door-knocking, text-messaging, phone-banking, and mail as part of the organization's larger efforts. The result? The conservative candidate in the race gained 7 percentage points over the same race in November 2020. | == | Greater Georgia's efforts during the HD34 special election include: Efforts helped conservatives == from 2020 race by 7 percentage points Made 132,105 contacts with voters in HD34 Contacted 8,687 people in total Knocked 4,323 doors Assembled a team of 49 volunteers to mobilize voters and amplify the conservative message Hosted five phone-banking sessions Hosted three days of action supporting volunteer efforts Digital campaign received over 300,000 impressions * Received over 57,000 video views | | | | UPDATES: | SENATE FIELD HEARING PROTEST Volunteers for Greater Georgia defended election integrity from liberal attacks outside a recent U.S. Senate field hearing in Atlanta, where a mobile billboard also circled the venue with the facts about S.B. 202 July 19, 2021 | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | == | | | | GREATER GEORGIA SWING THROUGH SOUTH GEORGIA Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler visited Thomasville, Tifton, and Moultrie to connect with voters in South Georgia and hear their ideas for engaging more people July 13-14, 2021 | == == | == | | | | CHAIRWOMAN KELLY LOEFFLER SPEAKS TO ATLANTA YOUNG REPUBLICANS Loeffler joined the AYR to speak about Greater Georgia's mission and progress July 22, 2021 | == | == | == | == | | | | SPEAKING TO THE GEORGIA HOUSE GOP CAUCUS Loeffler shared updates and insights from Greater Georgia, including its efforts toward a strong win in HD34 July 23, 2021 | == | == | | | | GREATER GEORGIA MAKES A LAST-MINUTE PUSH IN HD34 Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler met with volunteers to make a last-minute push toward victory in the HD34 special election July 12, 2021 | == | == | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Republicans Get a Big Win Over Stacey Abrams in Georgia July 14, 2021 - == "Georgia Republicans got a big win over Democrats in a special election for a state House seat on Tuesday night. Republican Devan Seabaugh defeated Democrat Priscilla Smith in the election for House District 34 with 63 percent of the vote. Former Senator Kelly Loeffler (R-GA), who recently launched a nonprofit organization aimed at registering and reaching voters, Greater Georgia, celebrated the GOP's win. Loeffler's group played a major role in turning out Republican votes." Click == to read the full article. | | | | Democrat Claim of 'Smoking Gun' at U.S. Senate Rules Hearing Immediately Debunked as Quote Taken Out of Context July 20, 2021 - == "On Monday, members of the group Greater Georgia said the hearing was a means for Democrats to push for a federal takeover of elections. They described the hearing as 'political theater.' Greater Georgia members, in ==, asked whether members of the U.S. Senate's Rules Committee will hold field hearings in blue states, such as New York, Connecticut, and Delaware. Members said those states offer less ballot access and more restrictive absentee voting requirements than Georgia." Click == to read the full article. | | | | Former senator visits Moultrie for Greater Georgia July 13, 2021 - == "Former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler came to Moultrie Tuesday afternoon to discuss her new project, Greater Georgia. Loeffler met with representatives of the Colquitt County Republican Party to speak about how they can 'register, reach and activate' voters in Colquitt County. 'The General Assembly and the governor's office have done an amazing job increasing voter integrity. Our objective is to show these potential voters that we are working to restore the public's confidence,' Loeffler said during the event." Click == to read the full article. | | | | The little election with big names behind it July 12, 2021 - == "On the Republican side of the race, Kelly Loeffler's Greater Georgia group continued its own work to get voters to the polls there. Ahead of the first round of the special election last month, Greater Georgia conducted polling, ran digital ads, and deployed volunteers to the race. Loeffler personally knocked on doors and even held signs on the side of a Cobb County highway, encouraging residents to vote on or before Election Day." name: Peter Franchot
subject: Will you take my housing survey?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
Home ownership has become out of reach for far too many of our friends, family and neighbors. And Marylanders who don’t wish to become homeowners may face rental practices that lead to unhealthy housing situations. Our working families deserve better, which is why as your next Governor, I am going to take a bold approach to housing justice and ensure that more people can capture the value of the money they spend on housing.
If you have a moment, I’d like to hear from you directly on this issue. Will you take my short Housing Survey to let me know more about your personal experience with renting or buying a home? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zrPNaXMqTkW9T8EgNzP6BA2]
As part of my plan, I will introduce a program that offers the State of Maryland as a guarantor of mortgages in target communities. My goal will be to create parity across race and zip code for new home ownership rates by 2030. And for renters, I will pilot an eviction diversion program in which the state makes direct payments to landlords for up to 3 months for renters who demonstrate a temporary and significant loss of income. This is a compassionate approach that also saves the state money in the long term, by helping drive down housing insecurity and the increased dependence on social services it tends to generate.
Whether you're a retiree or a young person moving out for the first time, all of our communities have been affected by the lack of access to affordable housing. Your voice on this matters, so if you have a chance, please take my Housing Survey to let me know more about your experience.
Click here to take my Housing Survey. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zrPNaXMqTkW9T8EgNzP6BA2]
Thank you,
Warm regards,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em072421]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I just wanted to bump this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter, I know I’ve told you this already but I just wanted to bump this - I was outraised by my Impeachment Manager Opponent.
|
---
| | | Peter, I know I've told you this already but I just wanted to bump this - I was outraised by my Impeachment Manager Opponent.

_Fox News_ said my race could be the most expensive Senate race of ALL TIME, _Roll Call_ said it would decide control of Congress and on top of all that this race has recently been rated even more competitive than expected...and still, I'm not on track to meet my end of month goal.

It'll be even more difficult if my opponent outraises me again. That's why my Finance Director has given me a short list of top Trump Patriots that she trusts to help us get through this tough deadline I have approaching. Please, don't share this email and please don't let me down - I don't have that much time and can only reach out to a select group of hand-picked conservatives!

Your help means everything to me, Peter. It means the difference between Chuck Schumer packing the court, banning voter ID, and passing mass amnesty or returning to a Senate that puts America First. Thank you for always having my back,

Marco Rubio

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: [ALERT] They are trying to cancel me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Once again, the radical left from sea to shining sea is trying to cancel me. Maybe I should be used to it by now, but I refuse to cower
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Greene for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A "Headlines") Fellow Patriot Once again, the radical left from sea to shining sea is trying to cancel me. Maybe I should be used to it by now, but I refuse to cower. So they've spent the better part of this year attempting to attack and malign me within and beyond the Halls of Congress:
* In February, Nancy Pelosi revoked my committee assignments in Congress because I refused to apologize for being a conservative woman who champions freedom and refuses to play her games; she turned the other cheek when Ilhan Omar sided with known terrorists.
* Then Squad member Cori Bush chose to move her Congressional office because she couldn't have an office next to someone who dared to disagree with her (Grow up, Cori).
* In March, 73 Democrats attempted to expel me from Congress and on the same day, their friends at Twitter suspended my account.
* On Easter Sunday, Twitter suspended me after I tweeted "He is Risen."
* Just last week, my speaking tour was banned from venues because they don't like our message of freedom.
* **Now, Twitter has suspended me for a third time because I dared to question the party line on Covid.**

They are coming after me because I am standing up for you. _What will they do if you say something they don 't like?_ **[I need every liberty-loving American to make an immediate donation and help me fight back.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A "I need every liberty-loving American to make an immediate donation and help me fight back.")** This is all retribution because I filed my bill to impeach Joe Biden. They are hoping that they can pressure me into withdrawing it, especially after Hunter Biden's laptop contents have become public and they know it's just a matter of time. They are picking on the wrong girl - and we need to show them. **[If you love this nation and refuse to back down to the liberal bullies, then I need you to continue supporting my efforts to fight for the American people.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A "If you love this nation and refuse to back down to the liberal bullies, then I need you to continue supporting my efforts to fight for the American people.")** **_They hate me because they can 't stop me, especially when I have America-loving Patriots like you in my corner._** No matter what Pelosi, her lieutenants, Big Tech or the media throws at me, I won't tolerate their attempts to rig elections, stifle religious freedom, ban guns from law-abiding citizens, defund our police or allow illegal aliens to be rewarded with citizenship for breaking the laws of the land. I am duly elected to hold this office, and they have no right to punish me for exercising my First Amendment Rights. I will continue to question Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's attempts to destroy our nation with their socialist policies and no one will be able to stop me--especially if I have you by my side. **[We need to stick together to defeat their tyranny. Please donate today.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A "We need to stick together to defeat their tyranny. Please donate today.")** God Bless America, [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A "Marjorie Taylor Greene") Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [FIGHT BACK](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ZoQzY1ps88t4nfrH3pQqYA/5FSvFVH4eMJOa7ecSWaN0A "FIGHT BACK")
---

name: January 6 Investigation (via WDTO)
subject: Klobuchar gets creative on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Amy Klobuchar is revamping the Senate Rules Committee into an engine for change. Klobuchar, the Rules chairwoman, flew the committee down to Atlanta for a special field hearing in the epicenter of Republican attacks on voting rights. **“This is a concerted effort against our democracy.” Amy Klobuchar** Mitch McConnell's shameless GOP has an authoritarian game-plan in place to limit voting access in diverse communities like Atlanta that came out strong for Joe Biden and flipped both of Georgia's Senate seats blue. McConnell knows that Republican candidates perform best when voter turnout is low. He will do whatever he can to stop Klobuchar's Rules Committee in its tracks. But Amy Klobuchar isn't backing down. **“The point is we have a bigger jurisdiction, and that's our democracy.”** | **[PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32921263/297291284/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210724_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3ZWRlYTI1LWFkZWMtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oObnQhTd9TpfVonJM5IOm0FHP5AUiwqN6ayq0JTRdgM=)**
---

If you believe that anyone who can vote should be able to vote, then Amy Klobuchar needs your help, Peter. The voting rights movement will only succeed if we line up behind strong progressive leaders who will fight for our values. name: Team Kilmer
subject: Raising the minimum wage isn't "radical" -- it's overdue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
**" Minimum wage workers can't afford rent anywhere in America"**

It's clear the federal minimum wage is not a living wage. **[Will you join Derek in the fight to raise the minimum wage? Add your name today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-YYHZ40SljLGqLjhHEzt137_nZpi38PxsjzJamEZhKc=/IbAx1iX-shyTrBS6IcVvvHl5cxqtO0IU4kOeKatQ1uI=?gpsid=50_115_19885&ms=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/-YYHZ40SljLGqLjhHEzt137_nZpi38PxsjzJamEZhKc=/IbAx1iX-shyTrBS6IcVvvHl5cxqtO0IU4kOeKatQ1uI=?gpsid=50_115_19885&ms=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---
| Peter,

Today marks 12 years since the last federal minimum wage increase. In the past 12 years, as the cost of living has gone up and inflation has taken hold, the minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 per hour. That needs to change.

Recent reporting from _CNN_ proves what we already knew: $7.25 per hour is not a living wage. Nowhere in our country is rent affordable for minimum wage workers -- and that doesn't take into account the cost of groceries, childcare, or other basic necessities.

That's shameful. In the wealthiest country in the world, the lawful minimum wage should cover the cost of housing. And if it doesn't, then raising the minimum wage shouldn't be considered a radical idea -- it's common sense! It's why Derek is an original cosponsor of the Raise the Wage Act which would gradually raise the minimum wage to $15 _across the country_ by 2025.

**[Derek is fighting for workers' rights and for an economy that works better for everyone in Congress. If you agree it's past time to raise the minimum wage, add your name next to Derek's on today's anniversary »](https://act.myngp.com/el/-YYHZ40SljLGqLjhHEzt137_nZpi38PxsjzJamEZhKc=/IbAx1iX-shyTrBS6IcVvvHl5cxqtO0IU4kOeKatQ1uI=?gpsid=50_115_19885&ms=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer | [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-YYHZ40SljLGqLjhHEzt137_nZpi38PxsjzJamEZhKc=/L4-bT_Jw6O9sxnHqBx-TZo6nAX7vNMhhDViD-OCFiEU=?gpsid=50_115_19886&refcode=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210724_MinWag_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: Erica Smith for North Carolina
subject: FWD: Focus group (please respond)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
What issue should be our top focus heading into Q3?
#
Hey— we noticed you haven’t entered our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group yet. [**If you have a few minutes, will you participate right now?** ](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210724-282&t=1&akid=282%2E3698%2EbacMMs)
This movement isn’t beholden to the establishment or corporate special interests — this movement is built by the people, for the people.
That’s why Erica is counting on your personal feedback as we set our budget and strategy for the rest of this quarter. [**If you can spare a couple of minutes, please participate in our Q3 Grassroots Focus Group — before we close submissions at midnight.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210724-282&t=2&akid=282%2E3698%2EbacMMs)
Thanks!
Erica Smith HQ
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: Erica Smith HQ <info@ericaforus.com>
Date: Thu, Jul 22, 2021
Subject: Focus group (please respond)
Don’t sit this one out. **We just launched our first-ever Grassroots Focus Group —[** _and Erica Smith is officially inviting you to participate!_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210724-282&t=3&akid=282%2E3698%2EbacMMs)**
Since you’ve never donated to our campaign, your direct response is extremely valuable. We’re looking for critical feedback as we set our campaign budget for the rest of Q3. Completing the Focus Group will only take a few moments.
[What campaign issue should be our top focus heading into Q3?](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210724-282&t=4&akid=282%2E3698%2EbacMMs) Select an issue: Health care COVID-19 Universal broadband Jobs and income equality Climate change Ending white nationalist domestic terrorism Weed legalization and justice Racial justice and reparations Lowering prescription drug prices Raising the minimum wage to at least $15 Unions and workers’ rights Affordable housing LGBTQIA+ rights Ending Washington corruption Education Immigrants’ rights Ending forever wars Campaign finance reform Gun reform College affordability and student debt Reproductive justice Ending the opioid epidemic **[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210724-282&t=5&akid=282%2E3698%2EbacMMs)**
---
It’s no secret that Erica Smith is the underdog in this competitive Democratic primary, and our campaign has limited resources. **That’s why your personal feedback about our campaign is so important.** We don’t have room for error during this critical Q3 period.
Erica wants to know: What top issues should we focus on? How do you feel about the trajectory of our campaign? How should we spend our limited resources?
[**_Our Grassroots Focus Group won’t be open forever, so please take a few minutes to participate today! Erica is really eager to hear what you think. Will you enter the Focus Group now?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210724-282&t=6&akid=282%2E3698%2EbacMMs)
**[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210724-282&t=7&akid=282%2E3698%2EbacMMs)**
Thanks for all you do,
Erica Smith HQ

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: 12 years since the minimum wage was increased
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Today is the 12th anniversary of the last time the federal minimum wage was raised. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed nationwide but currently 20 states still only require employers to pay their workers $7.25 an hour. This isn't enough. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922243/297294599/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWM3ZDU1Ni1iMWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umFdRsFoiosu0fEds4HLf3fn3BcvuwYfSxHrqrFazis=&emci=5b71d806-c2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cac7d556-b1ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Today is the 12th anniversary of the last time the federal minimum wage was raised. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed nationwide but currently 20 states still only require employers to pay their workers $7.25 an hour. **This isn't enough.**

Kim has been fighting in Congress to raise the federal minimum wage because she believes that you shouldn't have to work multiple jobs to put food on the table or afford medical care. In 2019, she helped pass the Raise the Wage Act to increase the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour by 2025, but it was blocked by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.

**Peter -- families can't afford to wait any longer for a minimum wage increase.[ Will you add your name now to join Kim in the fight to raise the federal minimum wage?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922246/297294601/-1321337655?gpsid=8_30_19864&ms=em21_210724_minwag_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_210724_minwag_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210724_minwag_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWM3ZDU1Ni1iMWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umFdRsFoiosu0fEds4HLf3fn3BcvuwYfSxHrqrFazis=&emci=5b71d806-c2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cac7d556-b1ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922247/297294603/-1321337655?gpsid=8_30_19864&ms=em21_210724_minwag_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&refcode=em21_210724_minwag_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210724_minwag_adv_gq_act__dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWM3ZDU1Ni1iMWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umFdRsFoiosu0fEds4HLf3fn3BcvuwYfSxHrqrFazis=&emci=5b71d806-c2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cac7d556-b1ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
---

In 2016, Washington State voters passed an initiative to raise the minimum wage every year until 2020 with cost of living adjustments each year after that. We currently have the third-highest minimum wage nationwide, helping countless families across the state earn the living wage they deserve.

But we can't stop there. Kim's fighting to raise the federal minimum wage to ensure that everyone, in every state, is paid a living wage -- but she needs to know you have her back.

clean_body: Today is the 12th anniversary of the last time the federal minimum wage was raised. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed nationwide but currently 20 states still only require employers to pay their workers $7.25 an hour. This isn't enough. Peter, Today is the 12th anniversary of the last time the federal minimum wage was raised. Since then, the cost of living has skyrocketed nationwide but currently 20 states still only require employers to pay their workers $7.25 an hour. This isn't enough. Kim has been fighting in Congress to raise the federal minimum wage because she believes that you shouldn't have to work multiple jobs to put food on the table or afford medical care. In 2019, she helped pass the Raise the Wage Act to increase the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour by 2025, but it was blocked by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell. Peter -- families can't afford to wait any longer for a minimum wage increase. | In 2016, Washington State voters passed an initiative to raise the minimum wage every year until 2020 with cost of living adjustments each year after that. We currently have the third-highest minimum wage nationwide, helping countless families across the state earn the living wage they deserve. But we can't stop there. Kim's fighting to raise the federal minimum wage to ensure that everyone, in every state, is paid a living wage -- but she needs to know you have her back. clean_body: Because Texas gained 2 NEW seats. | Friend, Nancy Pelosi privately admitted to her donors that her majority could fall apart because of Texas’ 2 NEW congressional seats. That’s why I’ve set such an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 in the very first month of our campaign as we fight to win one of Texas’ new seats. With only 5 seats needed to take back the House majority from Pelosi, our race will truly be the MUST-WIN race of the midterms. But with the end-of-month deadline quickly approaching, we’re still $189,750 short of this ambitious first goal. Over the last year, while the radical Left stripped Americans of their liberties, voters flocked to red states like Texas where they knew they would be FREE. And as a result, Texas is GAINING 2 new congressional districts while California and New York are losing 2. Pelosi knows her majority is on its last leg. Friend, now is our moment: Republicans only need to win 5 seats to take back the House from Pelosi’s control -- and our race for one of Texas’ new seats is the key. In other words, the fate of the House majority will be decided right here in Texas by you and me. Thank you, Wesley Hunt U.S. Army Captain (ret.) name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Add your name: Raise the minimum wage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The last time the federal minimum wage was raised was exactly twelve years ago today. That’s right - twelve years.
#
Peter,
The last time the federal minimum wage was raised was exactly twelve years ago today. That’s right - twelve years.
While housing, health care, education and other essential living costs have continued to increase, the federal minimum wage has remained at $7.25 per hour since 2009.
We can not lose sight of the fact that people are working 40 hours a week making the federal minimum wage and still living in poverty. It’s past time to take action and increase the minimum wage and end the subminimum wages.
**[Can I count on your support to increase the minimum wage? Add your name right now if you’re with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922459/297295212/583104732?ms=pm_em_210713_1&refcode=pm_em_210724_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y4NTU5Yy1iMWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z6ggVCkp1bOGkk2NIrZUBbWlErroz7X1fAMYuS_5kBw=&emci=16be2e26-edeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b3f8559c-b1ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
After more than a decade since the last federal minimum wage increase, the tides are turning. Now, we need to show the overwhelming support for action to encourage Congress to finally get this done.
There’s a lot of work ahead but I know that with your support, we can keep making the progress working families across Washington state and our country need.
**[Sign on now to support increasing the federal minimum wage and ending the subminimum and tipped wages.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922460/297295213/583104732?ms=pm_em_210713_1&refcode=pm_em_210724_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Y4NTU5Yy1iMWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z6ggVCkp1bOGkk2NIrZUBbWlErroz7X1fAMYuS_5kBw=&emci=16be2e26-edeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b3f8559c-b1ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty

I’m taking a lead role in reaching a bipartisan agreement on infrastructure. We have a huge chance in the next couple weeks to rebuild from the pandemic and make sure our country comes back stronger than ever -- but we have to act now.

| | Derek, We have a huge chance in the next couple weeks to rebuild from the pandemic and make sure our country comes back stronger than ever -- but we have to act now. I’m taking a lead role in reaching a bipartisan agreement on infrastructure. I believe we can get this done before Congress leaves for August recess, but I need your voice right now to help prove the American people urgently want action on these badly-needed investments. **_[Add your name right now to support investing in our infrastructure.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922576/297295700/-795112000?ms=mw_em_210723_1&refcode=mw_em_210723_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGEwZDExYS1iMmVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dkqU3vN0Qvuwp32tyX16hGoAoeYh5Gtk2GNgsg3YWUM=&emci=6b6faa77-c6eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0da0d11a-b2ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** This bill will allow us to repair our bridges and roads, improve our transportation systems, expand access to broadband networks, and boost our resilience to climate change and extreme weather. These improvements will create new, good-paying jobs and are essential for us to compete globally in the twenty-first century. We can get it done this month -- but I need you to speak up right now. **_[Sign on now to support urgent investments in our infrastructure.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922577/297295701/-795112000?ms=mw_em_210723_1&refcode=mw_em_210723_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGEwZDExYS1iMmVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dkqU3vN0Qvuwp32tyX16hGoAoeYh5Gtk2GNgsg3YWUM=&emci=6b6faa77-c6eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0da0d11a-b2ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** Thank you for joining me, Mark Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32922578/297295702/-1268790560?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGEwZDExYS1iMmVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dkqU3vN0Qvuwp32tyX16hGoAoeYh5Gtk2GNgsg3YWUM=)**

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: On this day in history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
**Peter, a lot has happened since July 24, 2009:**
Mitt Romney unsuccessfully ran for president, again.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210724?refcode=em20210724-488&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=488_420207_tHuvSu&akid=488%2E420207%2EtHuvSu)
The Supreme Court struck down part of the Defense of Marriage Act in 2013, setting the stage for their eventual ruling in _Obergefell v. Hodges_ that made marriage equality the law of the land in 2015.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210724?refcode=em20210724-488&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=488_420207_tHuvSu&akid=488%2E420207%2EtHuvSu)
The Seattle Seahawks won their first Super Bowl in 2014.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210724?refcode=em20210724-488&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=488_420207_tHuvSu&akid=488%2E420207%2EtHuvSu)
And Pramila became the first South Asian American woman to be elected to the House of Representatives!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210724?refcode=em20210724-488&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=488_420207_tHuvSu&akid=488%2E420207%2EtHuvSu)
Unfortunately, there’s something that hasn’t happened yet: Raising the federal minimum wage from $7.25/hour to at least $15/hour._In fact, the minimum wage hasn’t budged even one cent in 12 years!_
At a time when full-time, minimum-wage workers can no longer afford a two-bedroom rental anywhere in the entire country, our inaction is inexcusable. _It’s time to raise the wage._**And with Pramila’s leadership in helping to make Seattle the first major city in America to enact a $15 minimum wage years ago, we can make it so across America.**
[**On this day marking the last time we raised the federal minimum wage, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to help power Pramila’s work to fight for and deliver a living wage?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210724?refcode=em20210724-488&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&refcode2=488_420207_tHuvSu&akid=488%2E420207%2EtHuvSu) _Your donation sends a powerful message that our movement isn’t backing down:_
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210724?refcode=em20210724-488&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&refcode2=488_420207_tHuvSu&akid=488%2E420207%2EtHuvSu)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210724-488-footer&t=26&refcode2=488_420207_tHuvSu&akid=488%2E420207%2EtHuvSu)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: Peter, a lot has happened since July 24, 2009: Mitt Romney unsuccessfully ran for president, again. The Supreme Court struck down part of the Defense of Marriage Act in 2013, setting the stage for their eventual ruling in Obergefell v. Hodges that made marriage equality the law of the land in 2015. The Seattle Seahawks won their first Super Bowl in 2014. And Pramila became the first South Asian American woman to be elected to the House of Representatives! Unfortunately, there’s something that hasn’t happened yet: Raising the federal minimum wage from $7.25/hour to at least $15/hour.In fact, the minimum wage hasn’t budged even one cent in 12 years! At a time when full-time, minimum-wage workers can no longer afford a two-bedroom rental anywhere in the entire country, our inaction is inexcusable. It’s time to raise the wage.And with Pramila’s leadership in helping to make Seattle the first major city in America to enact a $15 minimum wage years ago, we can make it so across America. Your donation sends a powerful message that our movement isn’t backing down: In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

With more than $3 MILLION raised and a commanding lead in the polls, we have solidified ourselves as the clear FRONTRUNNER in this critical race that will decide the fate of the 50-50 Senate. But we’re not the only ones looking at these numbers... Kamala knows how much of a threat we pose to her Senate majority. We must ensure we have the funds to fight back against the Left’s attacks now that Kamala and her megadonors like George Soros will do whatever it takes to stop us. This wouldn’t be the first time the Left went all in to try and stop me... George Soros already sent one of his prosecutors to attack me because he knew I was a loyal supporter of President Trump and refused to comply with the swamp’s orders. And now with Kamala’s Senate majority hanging by a thread, I can only imagine what schemes they will cook up next. We cannot take our frontrunner status for granted. body:
Like a lot of folks, I’m tired of the partisanship and cheap shots.

|
---

| |

[**_Don Bacon just launched his first personal attack against me. Like a lot of folks, I’m tired of the partisanship and lies. I’m running to bring civility back to our politics and get things done. But I need to raise $4,055 before midnight to reach voters and let them know my message. Can I count on your $10 to help? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32924243/297302925/1129282168?refcode=20210724_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDBkMDY2OC1iYWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsvxbycGIToPxg6GwavrA1sSEcC_4MjWxaOPKiMmkEM=)

When I read Bacon’s attacks against me -- I wasn’t completely surprised.

Inflammatory statements and name calling have become the ‘new normal.’

[**Our country needs leaders who want to bring us together. Nebraskans deserve better from their representative in Washington, and I am up to the task.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32924245/297302953/1129282168?refcode=20210724_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDBkMDY2OC1iYWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsvxbycGIToPxg6GwavrA1sSEcC_4MjWxaOPKiMmkEM=)

It’s gotten harder and harder to find common ground with the people we disagree with, but I entered this race because I know that we have more in common than we are different.

I know that with a new generation of leadership, we can put the focus back on the issues that impact our daily lives -- not whether you lean **red** or **blue**. That’s how I’ve led as a state senator and that’s how I’ll operate in Washington, too.

I’m running as a son of union workers, a former public school teacher, and a dad who has seen hardworking families get left in the dust thanks to partisan politics.

[**_Right now Bacon has $420,000 lined up to fuel his reelection and stick to the status quo. We need change -- and I know change is possible if I can win this important race and bring a new type of leadership to Washington. But to reach voters early and convince them to support me, I need to hit my $4,055 goal._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32924246/297302959/1129282168?refcode=20210724_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDBkMDY2OC1iYWVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BsvxbycGIToPxg6GwavrA1sSEcC_4MjWxaOPKiMmkEM=) [**So I’m asking: If you’re tired of the status quo, will you chip in $10 now to help me respond to Rep. clean_body: Like a lot of folks, I’m tired of the partisanship and cheap shots. | | | = When I read Bacon’s attacks against me -- I wasn’t completely surprised. Inflammatory statements and name calling have become the ‘new normal.’ = It’s gotten harder and harder to find common ground with the people we disagree with, but I entered this race because I know that we have more in common than we are different. I know that with a new generation of leadership, we can put the focus back on the issues that impact our daily lives -- not whether you lean red or blue. That’s how I’ve led as a state senator and that’s how I’ll operate in Washington, too. clean_body: I refuse to give these radicals an inch. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, In the Battleground State of Iowa, a failed Democrat congresswoman just launched a campaign to unseat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley. This radical socialist’s campaign launch is part of a pattern that’s manifesting here in North Carolina, as well: extremists, pretending to be moderates, attacking true American Patriots and our traditional values. | | The fact is that the Democrats want to make America a fundamentally different place than the one that you and I grew up in. They want to “Change America” and impose their “woke” values on our children and grandchildren. But as long as I have breath in my lungs, I am going to fight them every step of the way. Will you join me? | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

subject: Tucker Carlson: Kamala Harris is a “power-hungry buffoon”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | It seems the GOP's relentless attacks against VP Kamala Harris are working, Peter: New polling from Morning Consult-POLITICO shows that VP Harris' favorability has dropped significantly in the last month, with **less than half of Americans now approving of her performance.** For months, sexist far-right media pundits like Jesse Watters have taken to Fox News claiming that VP Harris is “politically very stupid.” They've accused her of spreading “toxic femininity” from the White House. And now Tucker Carlson is attacking Harris as a “power-hungry buffoon” for taking the lead in the Democratic fight for voting rights. Harris is already one of the most effective VPs in history \-- we know that. But we can't ignore that the GOP's smear campaign is already shaping the public view of this historic vice presidency. Today, we're updating our records to see if committed Democrats still approve of our VP. You're one of our most engaged supporters, Peter, and it's crucial we hear from you to get the most accurate data. Peter, turns out Dr. Fauci has some friends in big tech.

After I questioned him on his blatant lies about NIH funding for gain of function research, Google came after me! They took down my videos that detail the entire paper trail of Fauci's involvement with funding the Wuhan lab. They called it "medical misinformation!"
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003342:6DKKcZltN:m:1:3253819041:E460FCE25883DC1DCAD054A95F9B2E71:r)
This is ridiculous.

✅ I used basic NIH definitions of gain of function research.
✅ I provided documentation.
✅ I presented the facts.

**_And Google responds with ... censorship. _**

These are wild times, Peter. These big tech giants are willing to work as an arm of the federal government to protect the bureaucracy. **Free speech be damned.**

_Fighting for the truth has truly never been more difficult or more important._

And I need you fighting with me.

Please chip in today to fight this censorship and help me hold Dr. Fauci accountable: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2627905/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003342:6DKKcZltN:m:1:3253819041:E460FCE25883DC1DCAD054A95F9B2E71:r)**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul
