name: Nikki
subject: hey team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

I hope you’re having a good weekend!

I’m sorry to bother you on a Saturday, but I wanted to make sure you saw Stefanie’s message from yesterday.

I just touched base with her, and it looks like we need to raise just $1,129 before tonight to get back on track for July. We know this is a tough month for fundraising, but hitting our monthly goals is absolutely critical to our success next year.

If you’re able to chip in today, it would make a world of difference. Please click here to give $5 or more to our campaign before tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Thanks for all you do!

Nikki

Begin Forwarded Message:
From: Stefanie Sass
Subject: memo
Date: July 23, 2021 at 9:25:51 PM EDT
To: Nikki Fried

Friends—

As we move closer to the end of the month, I wanted to give you a quick update on fundraising.

First, the good news. We launched this campaign in June and had a strong first month of fundraising thanks to grassroots supporters like you. It’s clear we have the momentum.

But friends, I’m worried right now. July is one of the most difficult months to raise money, and we’re on pace to fall short of our monthly goal.

If we can raise just $3,491 before Saturday at midnight, we’ll be in a strong position heading into the last week of July. Can you click here to chip in now and help us get back on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Campaigns write about deadlines all the time, so I want you to know why this is so important.

Ron DeSantis continues to raise millions each month from wealthy political donors across the country. Hitting our fundraising benchmarks each month means we can execute our most aggressive plan to defeat DeSantis next year.

Reaching our July goal directly affects what we’re able to accomplish next year. Please click here to donate, help us stay on track, and stop Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Thanks!
Stefanie Sass
Finance Director

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

# Hello, Patriots!
---
|
---
**ReAwaken America in Anaheim CA**
Our President just returned from Anaheim, CA where she spoke in front of over 2500 patriots at Influence Church. She was among General Flynn, Mike Lindell, Patrick Byrne and many other great American Patriots! Our President has been added to the tour with 3 remaining cities. Get YOUR tickets at
https://www.thrivetimeshow.com/reawaken-america-tour/
Use the LFAF code to receive your 10% discount. Only 48% tickets left!
View our President at:
https://rumble.com/vk6nnk-bianca-gracia-latinas-for-trump.html
---
Our Faith Based Director Rolando Rodriguez and North Texas Ambassador Sheena Rodriguez coordinated VIVA CUBA LIBRE events across Texas this week to show that we stand for Freedom and Liberty, We stand with the People of Cuba and We STAND AGAINST COMMUNISM!
---
| |
---
---
---
---
---
Our State Director Mayra Gutierrez and grassroot activist Simon Garza have been out blocking walking to re-elect Mayor Richard Molina in Edinburg, TX
---
| |
---
---
---
|
---
Our Communication team was out in California at a Women's leadership conference learning about saving California. Great Job Cynthia Kaui!
---
**This week our President Bianca Gracia testified at the Texas Capitol on behalf of securing and closing the border!**
---
| |
---
---
---
|
---
This July we sponsored a table at CPAC. We met so may patriots, connected with old friends, and registered many new members. We held a private meeting with Candidate for Governor of Texas Don Huffines and met with many other candidates from across the country.
All of our leaders made their presence know by interviewing with Fox News, OAN, Newsmax, and many other radio and podcast. Let's just say we made our presence known for ALL of YOU!
| |

---
---
---
Our Florida Team, VP Ozzy, Chief of Staff Enrique, Sergeant of Arms Adolfo Dominguez, and Marketing Director Kelly always representing in Florida from making their presence at the Florida Trump Rally to supporting our Florida Federated Women!
---
| |
---
---
---
|
---
**Hannity & Trump Town Hall in Edinburg TX**
Patriots, we showed up in Edinburg Tx to show our love and support for President Trump. We believe it was important to show that the grassroots is alive and well! So many coalitions came together to drive around South Texas in support of Trump! We attended the town hall and our President Bianca Gracia met with many of the elected officials to discuss the future of America, Texas, and our Hispanic communities!
| |
---
---
---
---
---
|
---
**Red, White, and Blue Bus Tour**
July 4th weekend was full of patriotism around the country. Our President travelled to Sturgis, SD to kick off the Red, White, and Blue bus tour featuring our Latinos for America First PAC. The event was phenomenal and we must share that America is still Alive and worth fighting for....
| |

---
|
---
Meanwhile in Corpus Christi, TX our South Texas Director and Vice President held a patriotic Boat Parade full of God loving American patriots!
Job Well Done!

Did you see Lisa’s last email? Our office is incredibly worried about the burder inflation is putting on the everyday American worker like you and m Peter, Did you see Lisa’s last email? Our office is incredibly worried about the burden inflation is putting on the everyday American worker like you and me. We have one quick question for you. Your response would really be appreciated. [**Are you okay with this year's inflation rate?**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d75cd6e78d24ec99e39a30248f8cf87&_e=BhgRGKwRKlVNK4oA2TjU1UnxlRiFJPQfCn3g3NGQNEcWEnIfI2G3aOFQ7EvyL-KmTjFVnseEX6rxFXj7A8YDix_BJeuLaT--9T53o7Z4T2wTXC4ME9ueHOd8gnvGdGyZxZ-u7yJnnFX_Ubni502Fi5zEM8wZ1xROPlFN9so0mxuTiC6VwX3rrjD_Tkmz_OCbttvHc43XDeNpI-ZskaMtHWnAvLKszyBXF2fAPDTS7noWDpv0GIKaYCut1iIxiwOHCfYOGayiP675NDvRDYEw2NsjpG7BQ1qEUYGn_7KijYtXZBe80N0riE_orLJo7eX6KrPkyUEZ767AS85zvuYweXS5wcRWo20xsFbDdNuPwF1YSqXyk1b0rTMN509bE0-YVtyrAc5Ag0orGYN38oosuR6UXn47ZvOUPShv6hWO3gE2Mh8E8-x1FzOZSYM2Pl4I) [**Yes**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d75cd6e78d24ec99e39a30248f8cf87&_e=BhgRGKwRKlVNK4oA2TjU1UnxlRiFJPQfCn3g3NGQNEcWEnIfI2G3aOFQ7EvyL-KmTjFVnseEX6rxFXj7A8YDix_BJeuLaT--9T53o7Z4T2wTXC4ME9ueHOd8gnvGdGyZxZ-u7yJnnFX_Ubni502Fi5zEM8wZ1xROPlFN9so0mxuTiC6VwX3rrjD_Tkmz_OCbUTiIrQVhw7IwrKm0A1VIBadB_P-sv7aDbXsjZOybf9BmQx7p2JAQjVBuK51GcttV2c6ZCbnhqIy2BF9oFqSBqtvv9rIk5mo2V3xWAQwu3LU2BQkZuRztY67ybVaGyFVwD4E-jvBumnxn7NwgVtviOTY3rlXLERqcKW02p7rTB-NlEsIlImZaufyeEJgijAcAGZyMY7MyA91edvnMGIOjDpm590iep0n835YktGdw4nVaiIj9m5-Em6HeFIarsBhl) [**No**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d75cd6e78d24ec99e39a30248f8cf87&_e=BhgRGKwRKlVNK4oA2TjU1UnxlRiFJPQfCn3g3NGQNEcWEnIfI2G3aOFQ7EvyL-KmTjFVnseEX6rxFXj7A8YDix_BJeuLaT--9T53o7Z4T2wTXC4ME9ueHOd8gnvGdGyZxZ-u7yJnnFX_Ubni502Fi5zEM8wZ1xROPlFN9so0mxuTiC6VwX3rrjD_Tkmz_OCbtKaSt8CsnEqttk7a-cBDmQVVA3FBgeJhT_zSNDYPAJEA47XK7flXvDJ6No36LMR585wmUON8opysxbpof5yZmyOt0pAgOy_9vdbZFuQws-OqfTcW8zkXD2YKJRiH8ZNVVaVwOQUwhWnPbD-E0Vv2ajGvVvK2Rzyl9xE6NYkKKv6FK7OQMzVjlk_j4f1qftpLGOXJMCH9ubrlloM37Fa9Fool7gzQym3R_a04X9WgUOsO6yRlkebMi3Oh-a4fu0rE) We just found out the inflation rate hit 5.4%, and it is clear our economy is going in the wrong direction. With this high rate,**inflation has reached a 13 year high! ** **[On top of this, in June, real weekly earnings fell 1.4% and real hourly earnings fell by 1.7%. Inflation is hitting American workers hard and it does not look good. ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d75cd6e78d24ec99e39a30248f8cf87&_e=BhgRGKwRKlVNK4oA2TjU1UnxlRiFJPQfCn3g3NGQNEcWEnIfI2G3aOFQ7EvyL-KmTjFVnseEX6rxFXj7A8YDix_BJeuLaT--9T53o7Z4T2wTXC4ME9ueHOd8gnvGdGyZxZ-u7yJnnFX_Ubni502Fi5zEM8wZ1xROPlFN9so0mxuTiC6VwX3rrjD_Tkmz_OCbFlB6B6g46yBnyXtxW_MTWb1FPAPtprkA1oXSpquPK89cGLs8_VsGXiWueMmtXyrY7hFhmiM3SX2dhfRqg193GKKTuTs7GwS3R_B8SJ7II8Lop6gdh9KYhb8XORdrFvcvfvTyGI_F0PYRtRkTm4284MDoLPoDMdeX9-XBq-1gGJViQRr-bpw3NV3XPunVsZfApHAT9uQAwiipwt0aUuUDafQo8M-rSmld02ZXiKurT_IfFXAKHBRf2791ravNINx5)** While all of this is going on, Far-Left Susan Wild and her cronies are pitching a $3.5 trillion spending plan. If they want to exacerbate the problem, this is exactly how to do it. With trillions of dollars spent in the last year and half, we simply do not need any more government spending. Instead of helping the economy, it is greatly hampering it. Slash the spending, slash the regulations, and stop the overflow of taxes! Let the American economy do what it does so well... **innovate** , **create jobs** , and **get people back to work. ** [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d75cd6e78d24ec99e39a30248f8cf87&_e=BhgRGKwRKlVNK4oA2TjU1UnxlRiFJPQfCn3g3NGQNEcWEnIfI2G3aOFQ7EvyL-KmTjFVnseEX6rxFXj7A8YDix_BJeuLaT--9T53o7Z4T2wTXC4ME9ueHOd8gnvGdGyZxZ-u7yJnnFX_Ubni502Fi5zEM8wZ1xROPlFN9so0mxuTiC6VwX3rrjD_Tkmz_OCbPWk1RBmVjPGBnrMXcxt0h1TD1thvnkLgLyejNWZsHgS3TbdN2HtBn8j8sYV2tPJD4TdE4OBhJZvOG6JhsmupysEYtHkgvbP0rYXJJz4XsTcqYivw9LeXeoV_7_a3Tf87uKBn6qO2Z0QR8N-ocH8IkIuu0BadCCacqCfudJFIo5lxdgVL6XAb9KIC2peO3VnriFmG2nGOAjy45FVZYm20dXZJgPSkrZCFGoE2GkOikDNUR408BB6OCSSQZDr2TAAK) [**HELP OUR ECONOMY**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=8d75cd6e78d24ec99e39a30248f8cf87&_e=BhgRGKwRKlVNK4oA2TjU1UnxlRiFJPQfCn3g3NGQNEcWEnIfI2G3aOFQ7EvyL-KmTjFVnseEX6rxFXj7A8YDix_BJeuLaT--9T53o7Z4T2wTXC4ME9ueHOd8gnvGdGyZxZ-u7yJnnFX_Ubni502Fi5zEM8wZ1xROPlFN9so0mxuTiC6VwX3rrjD_Tkmz_OCbgG-2xKo_gVcA3KrJUTcP9Gw82PHgLMTJ9-dOe-qGgihtJUpD1GFDHyPqu25alLQ3dBCQVLOYoHSVfFsq0bSPi7H3CZBsPQ75wmRxswEL-Fc2aiPESYb9W5pKO8yOoaYjP1WxYri8lnT3xKywduFvg2CU_JFiNoOOEKkFClYVyB7HfXHwjDWdn8Ri7EDPHmFJ1NW6uNtV8Uq70n3uMfRQ0Xilj0Xl3HxT44iuj3t81QfpD2t5bvOjW7YqaYkpcHsl) We really appreciate your opinion. With low growth rates predicted, falling wages, and rapidly rising inflation, we are worried for our economic future.

Thank you, Team Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Cox=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Trickery. Political scheming. Moving the goalposts...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
During a press conference yesterday, John Cox blasted the insiders at the California GOP for being no better than the Democratic insiders. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=b8a6795190&u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=eaa01dce01)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9c9d25ec7f&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=c4ebf664b6&e=b8a6795190)
---
### Cox Calls Out California Republican Party’s Trickery
During a press conference in front of California Republican Party’s headquarters in Sacramento yesterday, [John Cox blasted the insiders at the California GOP](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e1671e6f98&e=b8a6795190) for being no better than the Democratic insiders and career politicians who have destroyed California. **Insiders at the California Republican Party are preparing to change their own endorsement rules in the middle of the recall election** in an effort to help their preferred candidate. Cox warned that the political schemes of Republican insiders would hurt the Party and could prevent the recall of Gavin Newsom.“Trickery. Political scheme. Moving the goalposts. The insiders at California Republican Party are now no better than the Democrats,” John Cox said. “As an outsider, as a man of integrity, as someone who desperately believes we must recall Gavin Newsom to save California. I won’t stand for it.”
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=5abb63af94&e=b8a6795190)
In his remarks, Cox said **he would not participate in a sham endorsement process that is aimed at garnering support for an establishment candidate preferred by the insiders**. Such a process Cox warned made the Republican insiders no better than the Democrats. It is an insult to the grassroots and will dampen turnout in the recall election.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=2b7619eee2&e=b8a6795190)
### Homelessness Policy Tour Recap
John made his ninth stop on his statewide tour to end homelessness on Thursday in **Santa Barbara**. John, along with the 8-foot trash ball, has traveled throughout the state of California over the last few weeks while sharing his plan to fix homelessness. The trash ball, which has been the backdrop for Cox’s press conferences during the tour, symbolizes the need to clean up the mess in California caused by homelessness.“All across California, politicians have wasted billions of taxpayer dollars on housing-first solutions,” said John Cox. “The old way of doing things hasn’t worked. As billions have been spent, homelessness has increased. **Shifting funding failed Housing-First programs to Treatment-First programs is a solution with a proven track record and a massive cost savings**.”
| [Read John’s Homelessness Policy Plan](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=b9efb5f8cb&e=b8a6795190)
---
### In Case You Missed It
Dan Walters of CalMatters revealed more facts about Gavin Newsom’s track record and his claims that California is “roaring back”.
“Gov. Gavin Newsom repeatedly chants that California is “roaring back” from pandemic, but ignores the state’s stubborn socioeconomic problems.” [**Read the article**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9f2de8b34c&e=b8a6795190)**.**
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=3291edd1ff&e=b8a6795190)
### Let’s Defeat Newsom Together
Thank you to those who attended Wednesday’s fundraiser in Los Angeles. You are the true patriots, the ones who will ultimately get Newsom fired. As John said in his press conference earlier this week, it wasn’t the California GOP insiders who gathered the signatures, who knocked on the doors. It was the grassroots. It was you. **I will continue to stand with the people who made this recall election happen and not the political insiders.** Together, we can recall this failed governor, remove the corrupt politicians, and reclaim the Golden State.
| [Contribute Now & Recall Newsom](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=3907ba50f5&e=b8a6795190)
---
| [Follow the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=87c56b61be&e=b8a6795190)
---
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=516344307c&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=c0a6024f28&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e1031cefdb&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=14573184b3&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=529d74a3f9&e=b8a6795190)

### [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e94ef76a0a&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Great Loss for Clark County
body:
Pray for the men and women who work to keep us safe.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Clark County Sheriff's Deputy Killed In The Line Of Duty
---
| My heart is grieving today with the citizens of Clark County as we mourn the loss of Sheriff's Deputy Jeremy Brown. Deputy Brown was fatally shot outside an apartment building Friday night in Vancouver.
In a statement, Clark County Sheriff's Office confirmed the deputy's death.
"It is with great sadness the Clark County Sheriff's Office is informing the community a deputy was killed in the line of duty this evening. This is a difficult time for the Clark County Sheriff's Office, law enforcement agencies in Clark County and the surrounding Clark County, Portland metro area. Clark County law enforcement appreciates the support and understanding of the community in these tough times. The investigation is in its early stages and information will be released as it becomes available," the statement reads.
Events like this are a tragic reminder that every day, our Law Enforcement Officers put their lives at risk to protect the public from evil. Sadly, there will be forces and organizations that will use this killing to further their narrative against the police, but now more than ever, we need to support them and the crucial work they do for this community.
We pray today for Deputy Brown's family, his friends and his colleagues. Let's also remember to pray for our community. With new laws going into effect in Washington State, we are entering a time of real challenge, and it's crucial that we let our LEO's know that they are loved and appreciated.
I'm leaning into my faith in Jesus Christ today, as I have found no lasting comfort like the comfort that comes from Him. Because He has held so many of us when we have seen our worst days, He has taught us how to now use that same comfort to comfort one another.
2 Cor. 1:3-4 declares- 3 Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies and God of all comfort, who comforts us in all our tribulation, that we may be able to comfort those who are in any trouble, with the comfort with which we ourselves are comforted by God.
I am praying today for the God of all comfort to be especially near to this family and also to our community.
God knows we need Him now more than ever.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003403:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003404:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003405:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003406:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003402:J7gd3ZlNy:m:1:3253819041:26E3F3CF629C08FCAF52615FD164588B:r)**

So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican. I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values. And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!" I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth. Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values. When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time. And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Chief James Craig Former Detroit Police Chief P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. clean_body: The 2022 Election could be a pivotal moment in American history, and we need to know that we can count on you... Fellow American, We cannot stress enough how important this next year and a half will be. Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and House and Senate Democrats are working overtime to UNDO everything we accomplished the last four years under President Trump. They have made promises to their BIG GOVERNMENT SOCIALIST base, and if we don’t stop them, they will: - The 2022 Election could be a pivotal moment in American history, and we need to know that we can count on you, Fellow American. We need YOU to send a STRONG message to the Left that we will TAKE BACK our Republican Senate Majority in 2022, and then the White House in 2024. clean_body: We need your name on the Official Supporters List. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Peter, Tonight, President Donald J. Trump is taking the stage for his “Rally to Protect Our Elections” in the Battleground State of Arizona. Before President Trump steps out onto that stage, we’re sending him a list of the TOP SUPPORTERS who are fighting alongside him as he campaigns for Election Integrity. As one of the most reliable Grassroots Republicans in Englewood, FL, it’s essential that your name on that list, Peter. | OFFICIAL SUPPORTER RECORD EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #040945 DEADLINE: 7:00 PM on July 24 SUGGESTED GIFT: $35 or more | | | | | | | If your name isn’t on this Official List ahead of tonight’s Rally, it’ll be a huge red flag that your support is faltering, Peter. Rather than explain why you sat on the sidelines, we’d much rather explain how you stood up PROUDLY to help SAVE AMERICA when President Trump needed you most. Don’t wait, Peter. Time is running out! Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans |

name: STACEY ABRAMS ANNOUNCEMENT (via DCCC)
subject: Stacey’s STUNNING announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[Quickly -- Stacey Abrams has called us to action in a BIG WAY. She announced she's devoting her entire summer to helping pass Democrats' critical voting rights measures. But we need to ensure anti-voting rights Republican never take over the House. Under no circumstances can we let Mitch McConnell and the Republicans sabotage our voting rights for DECADES. Will you stand with Stacey and rush in $](https://links.e.dccc.)3[ before our End of Week Deadline to PROTECT our House Majority and DEFEAT anti-voting rights House Republicans? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Did you hear the news?!?!

**FIRST:**

Mitch McConnell and Republicans BLOCKED Democrats' HISTORIC voting rights bill.

**THEN:**

We learned Stacey Abrams is devoting her ENTIRE summer to stopping them.

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)

**NOW:
**
**[We're calling for an overwhelming wave of support -- 5,OOO gifts \-- before our End of Week Deadline to stand with Stacey and protect our pro-voting rights House Majority.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hv9-)**

**We need you to understand:**

If McConnell flips just ONE seat, he'll RECLAIM power in the Senate and continue to BLOCK Democrats' efforts to protect voting rights.

Stacey is fighting with everything she has to STOP him and PROTECT our Democrats.

Will you stand with her and rush $3 to defend our House Majority?
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. name: Candace Owens
subject: ✍️ [Petition Alert] The Olympics wants to CANCEL the American flag
body:
---
| | | | | | | | I'm proud to partner with Freedom Phone... a new secure, private, and completely _uncensorable_ smartphone. Ready to STOP Big Tech from censoring you online? Get 10% off your Freedom Phone with promo code **CANDACE** at [freedomphone.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003530:JqAraZlNS:m:1:3253819041:3236A1AAE033E9F5FA533C49CA537C05:r).
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003531:JqAraZlNS:m:1:3253819041:3236A1AAE033E9F5FA533C49CA537C05:r)
---
| Peter--I'm in shock!

The woke U.S. Olympic Committee wants to **" redesign" OUR American flag.** This is _outrageous_. **[I need YOU to sign the petition telling them to leave OUR FLAG ALONE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003531:JqAraZlNS:m:1:3253819041:3236A1AAE033E9F5FA533C49CA537C05:r "I need YOU to sign
the petition telling them to leave OUR FLAG ALONE.")**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003531:JqAraZlNS:m:1:3253819041:3236A1AAE033E9F5FA533C49CA537C05:r)
---
| Olympic athletes like hammer-thrower Gwen Berry are already using their platform to**amplify anti-American attacks on our nation.** Now, we find out the **U.S. Olympic Committee _itself_ doesn't think the American flag deserves to be featured on their logo** with all 50 Stars and all 13 Stripes. If you believe the **American flag should STAY the American flag** ... if you believe that the woke Olympic Committee should **[LEAVE our flag ALONE...](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003531:JqAraZlNS:m:1:3253819041:3236A1AAE033E9F5FA533C49CA537C05:r "LEAVE our flag
ALONE...")** **[Sign the petition. Tell them: the American flag should NOT be altered.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003531:JqAraZlNS:m:1:3253819041:3236A1AAE033E9F5FA533C49CA537C05:r "Sign the petition. Tell them: the American flag should NOT be altered.")**
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58003531:JqAraZlNS:m:1:3253819041:3236A1AAE033E9F5FA533C49CA537C05:r)
---
| The American people _must not_ and _cannot_ stand for this.
Thanks for your help,

Candace

subject: Fair and secure elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
Peter, This is the United States of America. The beacon for freedom and democracy world-wide. We must **DEMAND** that all elections, both past and present, are **FAIR** and **LEGAL**. **Elections MUST: **
* **Require voter identification**
* **Require signature verification on absentee ballots**
* **Prohibit unsecured drop boxes**
* **Prevent ballot harvesting**

Josh Mandel is calling on the U.S. Senate to create a **November 3rd Commission** to study the integrity of our 2020 election and ensure that elections are fair and secure moving forward! But he’s STILL being attacked by National Republicans. | | | Thank you for participating! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress?
